name: @ecdaerol/fastener-torque-calculator
description: Fastener torque and preload calculator — VDI 2230 based, with Torx screw support and soft material checks

scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.docs: typedoc --out docs src/calc/torque.ts src/calc/jointStiffness.ts src/calc/operatingState.ts src/calc/preloadRealism.ts src/calc/surfacePressure.ts src/calc/threadStripping.ts src/domain/useCase/computeResults.ts src/data/screws.ts src/data/materials.ts src/data/friction.ts src/data/washers.ts src/data/nuts.ts src/data/receivers.ts --name "Fastener Torque Calculator API" --readme none

author: Ecda Erol
